rulings.Case Title: GIGI ELLIS ET AL VS. OFFICE OF THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday October 24, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiffs fail to state a viable cause of action against the Defendants. =(501/REQ)
